findings.title: Git repository configuration file accessible
findings.impact: Source code and credentials may be leaked through the exposed git repository

findings.title: Reflected XSS in search parameter
findings.impact: Attacker can execute arbitrary JavaScript in victim's browser, steal session cookies

findings.title: .env file accessible
findings.impact: Database credentials and API keys exposed, leading to full application compromise

findings.title: phpinfo() page accessible
findings.impact: Server configuration details leaked, aids attacker in targeting known vulnerabilities

findings.title: Redis server accessible without authentication
findings.impact: Attacker can read/write data, execute commands via Lua, or use Redis as a proxy

findings.title: Directory listing enabled on /backup/
findings.impact: Backup files including database dumps are accessible to anyone

findings.title: Database backup file accessible
findings.impact: Database schema and potentially user data are leaked
